base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fairy_float — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Fairy — 2-frame wing-flap. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Fairy — 2-frame wing-flap; found in select ponds; restores HP on touch
